ALL BACK RENTS AND DAMAGES WAIVED EXCEPT FOR $50.00 PAYMENT TO BE MADE TO MANAGER ON/BEFORE 10-26-94. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS/FEES. IF CONDITIONS MET, PLTFF TO FILE ACKNOWL OF JUDGMNT.
